About.title: About BangaliBandhan
About.missionText: We aim to simplify the process of finding your life partner in the Bengali community through a secure and user-friendly platform.
About.reason1Text: Every profile goes through a strict verification process to ensure authenticity.
About.reason2Text: Your privacy is our priority. We use industry-standard encryption to keep your data safe.
About.reason3Text: Designed specifically for the unique needs and traditions of the Bengali community.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.subtitle: We're here to help you find your perfect match.
Contact.name: Full Name
Contact.subject: Subject
Contact.success: Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you soon!
Contact.error: There was an error sending your message. Please try again.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.a1: Registration and profile creation are free. Some premium features may require a subscription.
FAQ.q2: How do I verify my profile?
FAQ.a2: You can verify your profile by uploading a valid government-issued ID in your profile settings.
FAQ.a3: Yes, you can deactivate or delete your account at any time from the account settings.
FAQ.q4: How do I report a suspicious profile?
FAQ.a4: Use the 'Report' button on any profile to alert our moderation team.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.content: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use BangaliBandhan.

Terms.title: Terms & Conditions
Terms.content: By using BangaliBandhan, you agree to comply with our terms of service. Please read them carefully before using our platform.

Pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
Pricing.subtitle: Unlock premium features to find your partner faster.

Dashboard.assistanceDesc: Our matchmakers are here to help you find your perfect life partner.
Dashboard.noProfileDesc: You haven't created a profile yet. To find your partner and connect with others, please create your matrimonial profile first.
Dashboard.profileTip: A complete profile increases your chances of finding a match by 80%.
Dashboard.tagline: Here's what's happening on BangaliBandhan today.
Dashboard.live: Your profile is live and visible.
Dashboard.tip1: Keep your profile updated with recent photos to get 3x more interests.
Dashboard.tip2: Respond to received requests promptly to build trust.
Dashboard.tip3: Use advanced filters to find matches that share your values.
Dashboard.createDesc: Fill in your details to help us find the best matches for you.
Dashboard.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete your profile? This action cannot be undone.
